objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: vol_amplitude_breakout
archetype: vol_amplitude_breakout
family: volatility
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- amplitude_hunter(period=43)
- donchian(period=25)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: amplitude_hunter.score > 0.6 and close > donchian.upper
- short: amplitude_hunter.score > 0.6 and close < donchian.lower
exit:
- condition: amplitude_hunter.score < 0.2 or cross_any(close, donchian.middle)
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 2.5
tp_atr_mult: 3.5
description: ATR stop-loss (2.5x) and take-profit (3.5x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.hypothesis: Ajustement structurel basé sur le diagnostic précédent.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The strategy is based on volatility signals using ATR, Donchian Channels and EMA. The stop loss uses the 2.5x of ATR while take profit uses 3.5x AT.
[Backup plan] 3. Parameter adjustments such as reducing stop-loss or take-profit ratios can help increase Sharpe ratio but may not necessarily improve overall profitability. A more robust strategy would involve developing a deeper understanding of the market conditions and incorporating other risk management techniques like hedging.

iterations.hypothesis: La stratégie combine l'utilisation du ATR pour gérer les entrées et sorties ainsi que la surchirch-garde, le RSI permet de déterminer les zones d'achat ou de vente
